use_cases: Display multiple video content in a dynamic frame layout with configurable borders
Showcase media portfolios with hover-triggered video playback
Create interactive gallery layouts with smooth scale and position transitions
Build creative showcases with adaptive frame sizing and thickness controls
Develop immersive media presentations with video autoplay on hover
ai_summary: A dynamic frame layout component that arranges video content with configurable borders and frames. Features hover-triggered video playback using Framer Motion, smooth scale transitions, and adaptive positioning. Ideal for media galleries, portfolios, and creative showcases where visual presentation and interactivity are key. Supports customizable corner styles, edge treatments, and border thickness for flexible framing options.
